ROSALIA
  • API
  • rosalia
  • rosalia.bootima
  • View page source

rosalia.bootima

Functions

astheader(fits_list, ext, key[, verbose])

Writes keywords on fits files using astfits from GnuAstro

bootima(fits_list, ext, nsimul, outname[, ...])

A program to calculate median of large amount of images stored in fits files.

bootima_slice(fits_list, ext, nsimul, outname)

A program to calculate median of large amount of images stored in fits files.

does_it_fit_in_RAM(fits_list, ext[, verbose])

reconstruct_slices(slice_list, ext, outname)

slice_fits(fits_list, ext, nslices)
